news.title:
BofA cuts target prices for cement stocks like Ambuja, UltraTech, Dalmia Bharat citing rising input costs due to crude oil price hikes.
Shree Cement underperformed; BofA sees need for 6-7% price hikes before monsoon to offset cost pressures impacting sector margins.
news.summary:
BofA cuts target prices for cement stocks like Ambuja, UltraTech, Dalmia Bharat citing rising input costs due to crude oil price hikes.
Shree Cement underperformed; BofA sees need for 6-7% price hikes before monsoon to offset cost pressures impacting sector margins.

news.title:
DAM Capital upgrades cement sector to 'BUY', citing price hikes of ₹30-₹50/bag and attractive valuations.
UltraTech Cement, JSW Cement, Shree Cement, Ambuja, Dalmia Bharat, and Nuvoco see upsides of 7.4%-21.9%.
news.summary:
DAM Capital upgrades cement sector to 'BUY', citing price hikes of ₹30-₹50/bag and attractive valuations.
UltraTech Cement, JSW Cement, Shree Cement, Ambuja, Dalmia Bharat, and Nuvoco see upsides of 7.4%-21.9%.

news.title:
DAM Capital upgrades Dalmia Bharat to Buy with a target price of Rs 2,030.
Price hikes of Rs 30–50/bag from April 2026 expected to offset cost inflation.
news.summary:
DAM Capital upgrades Dalmia Bharat to Buy with a target price of Rs 2,030.
Price hikes of Rs 30–50/bag from April 2026 expected to offset cost inflation.

news.title:
Dalmia Bharat's Odisha kiln broke down on Mar 13, relit on Mar 27.
Operations hit by 2.5-3 lakh tons in Mar, stabilizing with normal output.
news.summary:
Dalmia Bharat's Odisha kiln broke down on Mar 13, relit on Mar 27.
Operations hit by 2.5-3 lakh tons in Mar, stabilizing with normal output.

news.title:
Dalmia Bharat Refractories acquired 3.33 lakh voting shares from Keshav Power via block deal.
Post-acquisition, promoter group holds 55.84% voting rights in Dalmia Bharat Ltd.
news.summary:
Dalmia Bharat Refractories acquired 3.33 lakh voting shares from Keshav Power via block deal.
Post-acquisition, promoter group holds 55.84% voting rights in Dalmia Bharat Ltd.

news.title:
Cement stocks, including Nuvoco, JK Cement, UltraTech, Dalmia Bharat, and Ambuja, fell 1-3% despite HSBC's positive outlook.
HSBC set price targets, with Nuvoco at ₹420 (+38.5%), Ambuja at ₹590 (+39.9%), and UltraTech at ₹13,750 (+22.7%).
news.summary:
Cement stocks, including Nuvoco, JK Cement, UltraTech, Dalmia Bharat, and Ambuja, fell 1-3% despite HSBC's positive outlook.
HSBC set price targets, with Nuvoco at ₹420 (+38.5%), Ambuja at ₹590 (+39.9%), and UltraTech at ₹13,750 (+22.7%).

news.title:
Dalmia Bharat's subsidiary faces Rs. 1.5B tax, interest, penalty for FY20.
The company plans appeals; financial impact limited to disputed amounts.
news.summary:
Dalmia Bharat's subsidiary faces Rs. 1.5B tax, interest, penalty for FY20.
The company plans appeals; financial impact limited to disputed amounts.

news.title:
Dalmia Cement to acquire 26% stake in Ventora Energy for Rs. 4.42 Cr.
Move aims to source 8.1 MW wind power in Tamil Nadu for sustainability.
news.summary:
Dalmia Cement to acquire 26% stake in Ventora Energy for Rs. 4.42 Cr.
Move aims to source 8.1 MW wind power in Tamil Nadu for sustainability.

news.title:
Cement stocks like UltraTech, Shree Cement, Ambuja, and Dalmia gained 3-6% before paring gains amid rising input costs.
Nomura suggests price hikes post-March to offset fuel costs; southern, eastern markets show resilience in demand trends.
news.summary:
Cement stocks like UltraTech, Shree Cement, Ambuja, and Dalmia gained 3-6% before paring gains amid rising input costs.
Nomura suggests price hikes post-March to offset fuel costs; southern, eastern markets show resilience in demand trends.

news.title: PMLA Tribunal cuts Dalmia Bharat's proceeds of crime claim to ₹92.52 Cr from ₹793 Cr.
news.summary: PMLA Tribunal cuts Dalmia Bharat's proceeds of crime claim to ₹92.52 Cr from ₹793 Cr.

news.title:
ED attached Rs. 793.34 Cr land of Dalmia Bharat Ltd; tribunal reduced it to Rs. 92.52 Cr.
Company plans legal action to contest the reduced Rs. 92.52 Cr figure.
news.summary:
ED attached Rs. 793.34 Cr land of Dalmia Bharat Ltd; tribunal reduced it to Rs. 92.52 Cr.
Company plans legal action to contest the reduced Rs. 92.52 Cr figure.

news.title:
ONGC detected unusual bids of exactly ₹7,000/tonne in a 2018 cement tender.
India Cements responded wryly to ONGC's query on the bidding anomaly.
news.summary:
ONGC detected unusual bids of exactly ₹7,000/tonne in a 2018 cement tender.
India Cements responded wryly to ONGC's query on the bidding anomaly.

news.title:
Top cement firms saw profit growth in Q3 FY26 despite price pressures.
Volume gains and operating leverage offset GST rate impact and lack of price hikes.
news.summary:
Top cement firms saw profit growth in Q3 FY26 despite price pressures.
Volume gains and operating leverage offset GST rate impact and lack of price hikes.

news.title:
Shree Cement, Dalmia Bharat, and Ramco Cements posted mixed Q3 FY26 results with notable capacity expansion plans projected at 7.4% CAGR till FY28.
Ramco Cements, Star Cement, and Shree Cement showed varied revenue growth, while Orient Cement reported a decline in both QoQ and YoY revenue.
news.summary:
Shree Cement, Dalmia Bharat, and Ramco Cements posted mixed Q3 FY26 results with notable capacity expansion plans projected at 7.4% CAGR till FY28.
Ramco Cements, Star Cement, and Shree Cement showed varied revenue growth, while Orient Cement reported a decline in both QoQ and YoY revenue.

news.title:
JPMorgan notes cement capacity growth may cap utilisation levels for three years, citing pricing vs market share conflict.
JPMorgan rates UltraTech Cement 'Overweight' with Rs 15,000 target; upgrades Dalmia Bharat to 'Neutral' with Rs 2,215 target.
news.summary:
JPMorgan notes cement capacity growth may cap utilisation levels for three years, citing pricing vs market share conflict.
JPMorgan rates UltraTech Cement 'Overweight' with Rs 15,000 target; upgrades Dalmia Bharat to 'Neutral' with Rs 2,215 target.

news.title:
Cement majors like Shree Cement, UltraTech, and Ambuja posted double-digit volume growth in Q3.
Firms expect demand and price recovery, aided by low inflation, tax reforms, and infrastructure growth.
news.summary:
Cement majors like Shree Cement, UltraTech, and Ambuja posted double-digit volume growth in Q3.
Firms expect demand and price recovery, aided by low inflation, tax reforms, and infrastructure growth.

news.title:
Morgan Stanley retains Underweight rating on Dalmia Bharat.
Target price for Dalmia Bharat is set at ₹1,800.
news.summary:
Morgan Stanley retains Underweight rating on Dalmia Bharat.
Target price for Dalmia Bharat is set at ₹1,800.

news.title:
Dalmia Bharat expects high single-digit cement demand growth in the East.
The company targets a trade share in the mid-to-high 60% range.
news.summary:
Dalmia Bharat expects high single-digit cement demand growth in the East.
The company targets a trade share in the mid-to-high 60% range.

news.title:
Dalmia Bharat guides for INR 200 crore incentive run rate next year.
The company aims to keep net debt to EBITDA ratio within 2.
news.summary:
Dalmia Bharat guides for INR 200 crore incentive run rate next year.
The company aims to keep net debt to EBITDA ratio within 2.

news.title: Dalmia Bharat's Q3 profit drops 46% due to lower cement prices in east and south.
news.summary: Dalmia Bharat's Q3 profit drops 46% due to lower cement prices in east and south.
